---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new role or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you'd like added or changed.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples.
